helpText: Generate data from the current schema directly into the grid. Test-data generation docs
Generate n-wise combinations from enum columns in the current schema directly into the grid. N-wise generation docs

text: Show grid to enum schema help
helpText: Scan the current grid and build an enum-only schema from the visible column values.
Edit as Text You are currently using row-based schema editing. Click Edit as Text to switch to text schema mode. Insert Example Schema

Regex Regex patterns generate random values that match the specified expression. Schema params field: (pattern) Params: pattern : regex string - The regular expression used to generate each value. Example: regex([A-Z]{3}) - Regex example usage. Learn more
Preview mode shows a sample of the first 10 rows from the data grid in the chosen format. Click Preview to switch to Edit mode and show full grid data.
